notes: Page content is primarily delivered via a Ceros iframe embed (https://johnson-matthey.ceros.site/indaba-landing-page). The visual sections below represent the content that would need to be recreated as native AEM content. Only the 'Contact us for more' section exists as native HTML outside the iframe.

excludedElements.header: Site navigation with JM logo, search, contact icon, mega-menu
excludedElements.footer: Dark background footer with quick access links, social icons, legal links

sections.overview: Hero banner with page title and embedded video

contentSequences.description: Large heading 'Developing the future of platinum group metals' centered on a dark blue/purple gradient background, with a video player/embed below showing a YouTube video thumbnail with play button

sections.overview: Partnership introduction with logos and descriptive text

contentSequences.description: JM logo with 'The future is precious' tagline, followed by a row of three partner logos (Johnson Matthey, Sibanye-Stillwater, Valterra Platinum) displayed side-by-side
Paragraph of text describing the partnership: 'Together, JM and Sibanye-Stillwater, a mining and metal processing company, are working to address market concerns surrounding...'

sections.overview: Educational content about PGM dependence with accompanying image

contentSequences.description: Two-column layout: Left side has heading 'Our everyday dependence on PGMs' with supporting paragraph text about PGMs being essential to everyday items. Right side has a large industrial/metallic close-up image

sections.overview: PGM opportunity section with dark overlay

contentSequences.description: Two-column layout: Left side has a dark industrial/textural image. Right side has heading 'The PGM opportunity' with paragraph text about supply opportunity, on a dark-tinted background with visible industrial imagery behind text

sections.overview: Leading Innovation callout with researcher image

contentSequences.description: Two-column layout: Left side has a bold blue background with large heading 'Leading Innovation'. Right side shows an image of a researcher/scientist in a lab coat

sections.overview: Contact section with team contact card

contentSequences.description: Heading 'Contact us for more' followed by a contact card with 'PGMS team' title and a 'SEND A MESSAGE' call-to-action button

blockCollectionAvailable.name: table
blockCollectionAvailable.purpose: Organize tabular data into a grid of rows and columns

blockCollectionAvailable.name: columns
blockCollectionAvailable.purpose: Present content side by side in multiple columns

blockCollectionAvailable.name: cards
blockCollectionAvailable.purpose: Showcase distinct pieces of information in card-based layout

blockCollectionAvailable.name: video
blockCollectionAvailable.purpose: Embed a stand-alone video with built-in player

blockCollectionAvailable.name: hero
blockCollectionAvailable.purpose: Prominent image, headline, and optional CTA at top of page

blockCollectionAvailable.name: carousel
blockCollectionAvailable.purpose: Display multiple images/slides in rotating format

blockCollectionAvailable.name: tabs
blockCollectionAvailable.purpose: Present multiple sections accessible by tab selection

blockCollectionAvailable.name: search
blockCollectionAvailable.purpose: Let users search site content by keyword

blockCollectionAvailable.name: embed
blockCollectionAvailable.purpose: Embed external content (video, social) directly into page
